title: The Duchess of Buffalo
writer: Max Brod, Hanns Kräly, George Marion Jr.
actors: Constance Talmadge, Tullio Carminati, Edward Martindel
plot: The storyline is loosely-based on Buffalo candy-maker August Merckens' opera-singer daughter Baroness Platon Von Wrangel, who married the Russian leader in the fight for restoration of the Russian monarchy.
